name: Access Control Verification Grimoire
description: Expert procedure for verifying access control vulnerabilities. Checks for missing access gates, privilege escalation paths, tx.origin usage, and role-based access issues.
author: VKG Team
graph_queries: FIND functions WHERE visibility IN [public, external] AND writes_privileged_state AND NOT has_access_gate

steps.name: Check Access Properties
steps.description: Query VKG for access control indicators

steps.name: Check State Variables
steps.description: Verify what privileged state is being modified

steps.name: Generate Auth Bypass Test
steps.description: Generate Foundry test to bypass access control

steps.name: Analyze Results
steps.description: Analyze all test and fuzz results

verdict_rules.explanation: Test confirmed unauthorized access is possible
Public function writes privileged state without access control
Uses tx.origin for authentication - vulnerable to phishing
Access gates present and no tx.origin usage
